issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://www.rottentomatoes.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rottentomatoes.com%2F) ### Comment > I repeatedly receive Admiral warnings on the Rotten Tomatoes website. I have installed filters that are supposed to address this issue, but they don't work. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/k1cm4jb1qv4wsw4o4kwwgokkwsow0oo8fo9lobbaxc.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.6 (5267) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.26200.0` Browser: | Edge License type: | paid Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
Adblock Warning Removal List

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Japanese filter Custom filters: | `User rules (url: none)` AdGuard driver: | WFP Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | server: `System`
filters: `AdGuard DNS Filter`, `User rules (url: none)` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)`
`AdGuard Popup Blocker (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.6+%285267%29&system_version=Microsoft+Windows+NT+10.0.26200.0&browser=edge&filters=2.7.19.21.207&custom_filters=User+rules+%28url%3A+none%29&dns_servers=System&userscripts=AdGuard+Extra+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fadguard-extra%2F1.0%2Fadguard-extra.user.js%29%2C%0AAdGuard+Popup+Blocker+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fpopup-blocker%2F2.5%2Fpopupblocker.user.js%29&dns.filters=AdGuard+DNS+Filter%2C%0AUser+rules+%28url%3A+none%29&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=true&stealth.flash=false&stealth.java=false&stealth.strip_url=false&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=false&stealth.disable_wap_push_message_routing_service=false&stealth.disable_windows_defender=false&stealth.disable_windows_telemetry=true&stealth.turn_off_advertising_id=true&referrer=&win.wfp=true&license_type=paid&scheme_version=2&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=0&dns.fallback_mode=System&stealth.disable_windows_recall=true)

comment.body:
While it would make sense if the `Adblock Warning Removal List` blocked this, The AdGuard filter team insists that it is only a tracker and not an anti‑adblock, so you will need to enable the `AdGuard Tracking Protection` filter to block it.

Note: If that doesn't fix it, you can try adding `||chalkdream.com^` to your user rules.

### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://technical.city/ru/cpu/Core-i3-8350K-protiv-Core-i5-13600K](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftechnical.city%2Fru%2Fcpu%2FCore-i3-8350K-protiv-Core-i5-13600K) ### Comment > Description > Ads and a sticky video player are not blocked on the website. When trying to use the manual blocking tool, the floating video container disappears or becomes unselectable, making it impossible to block manually. Disabling Brave's built-in shields does not resolve the issue. > > Steps to reproduce > Open https://technical.city/ru/cpu/Core-i3-8350K-protiv-Core-i5-13600K > > Observe the sticky video player (bottom/side) and banner slots. > > Try to use "Block ads on this website" tool on the video player. > > The element disappears from the selection tool but remains on the page. > > Expected behavior > Ads and sticky video elements should be blocked by the Base filter. > > Actual behavior > Ads are visible, and some elements evade the manual picker. > ___ > > ive blocked ads with brave browser selector so keys for this elements are - > > technical.city##.mt-iframe.r-container__expanded > technical.city###adzoneWrapper_banner_d_540_300_technical_rt-iframe > technical.city##.adzone-container.adzone-banner.adzone-banner-d-540-300-technical-rt > technical.city###content > .container > span:nth-of-type(1) > div.not-mobile-only:nth-of-type(6) > .not-mobile-only > technical.city##.mt-iframe.r-container__top > technical.city##.mt-iframe.r-container__right > technical.city##.mt-iframe.r-container__left > technical.city###mv-slot > technical.city###contentroll > technical.city###sticky-player-ad-container > technical.city###sticky-player ### Screenshots

comment.body:
Не повторяется. Фильтрация включена для Firefox? Какой сертификат используется браузером? Посмотреть в адресной строке, нажав на иконку щита - защищенное подключение.
Также можно попробовать сменить драйвер с `TDI` на `WFP`, перезапустив систему после.

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard for Windows ### AdGuard version 7.22.5 (5262) (CL 1.20.92, DL 2.7.6 ) ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed ads or ad leftovers ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? gemini.google.com/app ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy AdGuard URL Tracking filter ### Social Widgets AdGuard Social Media filter ### Annoyances AdGuard Annoyances filter, AdGuard Cookie Notices filter, AdGuard Popups filter, AdGuard Other Annoyances filter, AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter, AdGuard Widgets filter, Adblock Warning Removal List, Fanboy's Annoyances, EasyList Cookie List ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots In the chat with Gemini (on the official website), some accounts (apparently the subscription administrator account) are displaying an offer to upgrade to a more expensive subscription plan. The offer was spotted in the model selection menu and in the sidebar (when expanded). First issue can be resolved by the `gemini.google.com##.upgrade-container` rule. On the first sight, second does not have any unique characteristics. ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://yandex.ru/search/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fyandex.ru%2Fsearch%2F) ### Comment > В поиске Яндекс при любом поисковом запросе "быстрый ответ Алисы AI" отображается, но если нажать на кнопку "стрелка вниз" (развернуть), то поле полностью пропадает. Проблема появляется только при включенном AdGuard. "Быстрый ответ Алисы AI" мне требуется, и блокировать его нельзя ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/a2mrnxy2yvk8wwwogw8k04s4wso4k0kqazeekn72pc.png?nc=1)

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/issues).

I tried disabling each of the four protections individually — ad blocking, tracking protection, DNS protection, and the firewall — and also turned them all off at the same time, but the internet remains unavailable whenever AdGuard is turned on. comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
